feedback.technicalIssues: No technical issues were encountered during the study.
feedback.confusingParts: I don't get how the music rhythm game works. I don't like that style of game.
feedback.suggestions: For the FPS game make the key to fire a different key. Z is just way too close to WASD.
feedback.funCriteria: I decided a game was fun based on whether or not I was frankly good at it. Or if it reminded me of something that I had played previously and enjoyed.
